dm_standards_chapter: Volume 6, Chapter 1 - Development Management Standards & Guidelines
fetch_method: curl chapter PDF (1 Development Management Standards.pdf) + pdftotext -layout extraction
notes: DM standards are Volume 6 Chapter 1. The portal HTML chapter page is a navigation/submissions shell with a PDF link; PDF (~512KB) is text-based and was the source. Rich numeric content: 85%/65% site coverage, 22m separation, private open space Table 1, apartment floor areas Table 2, parking Table 4 (3 area zones), 215m visibility at 80km/h+, 4.5m gate recess, 45-deg splays. Car parking Table 4 plain-text alignment imperfect (multi-column) but values captured. No fixed residential density figure and no fixed rural one-off minimum site area (performance-based on EPA WWTS separation).
